name: monomind-improver
goal: Continuously analyze the Monomind codebase to find improvement directions, implement the highest-value improvement each cycle, and commit changes to the improve/auto git branch — looping 1 minute after each run completes until stopped.

phases.label: Analyze & Prioritize
phases.description: Scan codebase, open issues, recent commits, and foundation.md completed log. Produce a ranked list of improvement opportunities — bugs, UX gaps, performance, missing features, tech debt.

phases.label: Implement
phases.description: Pick the highest-ranked opportunity not yet done. Implement the change — write/edit code in the repo.

phases.label: Review
phases.description: Review the implementation for correctness, security issues, and adherence to project patterns. Flag any problems for the coder to fix.

phases.label: Commit to improve/auto
phases.description: Switch to improve/auto branch (rebasing on main if needed), stage changed files, write a descriptive commit message, commit. Log the improvement to foundation.md.

roles.title: Improvement Director
responsibilities: Load foundation.md at the start of each cycle to see what's already been done
Spawn the analyzer and review its ranked improvement list
Select the single highest-value improvement not yet completed
Delegate implementation to the coder with precise instructions
Pass coder output to the reviewer
After approval, instruct git-manager to commit
Log the completed improvement to foundation.md with a one-line summary
Wait 60 seconds after the cycle completes before starting the next one

roles.title: Codebase Analyzer
responsibilities: Read foundation.md to know what has already been improved — do not suggest the same thing twice
Scan recent git commits on main to understand current trajectory
Identify the top 5 improvement candidates across: bugs, UX issues, performance, missing features, tech debt
Rank them by estimated impact vs effort
Return the ranked list to the boss with a one-paragraph rationale for each

roles.title: Implementation Engineer
responsibilities: Receive a precise improvement spec from the boss
Read all affected files before editing
Implement the improvement cleanly — follow existing project patterns
Do not introduce unrelated changes
Pass the changed file list and a description of changes to the reviewer

roles.title: Code Reviewer
responsibilities: Review each changed file from the coder
Check for: logic errors, security issues, broken patterns, unintended side effects
If issues found: send back to coder with specific line-level feedback
If approved: pass file list and commit message suggestion to git-manager
Keep review focused — do not block on style preferences

roles.title: Git Commit Manager
responsibilities: Ensure improve/auto branch exists (create from main if not)
Rebase improve/auto onto latest main to stay current
Stage only the files changed by the coder (use git add -f for dist/ files)
Write a clear, descriptive commit message: what changed and why
Commit with Co-Authored-By: nokhodian <nokhodian@gmail.com>
Report the commit hash back to the boss
